items.e: No general limit — 130 advisory; min capability 60 km/h.
No stopping, parking, reversing, U-turns, pedestrians.
items.d: Kein Halten, Parken, Rückwärts, Wenden, keine Fußgänger.

items.e: Keep right; pass left; Rettungsgasse in jams.
100 out of town; no U-turns; stop only in emergencies.
items.d: Außerorts 100; Wenden verboten; Halten nur im Notfall.

items.e: 100 km/h for cars; overtake only with a clear view.
items.d: 100 km/h für Pkw; überholen nur bei freier Sicht.

items.e: Highest accident risk: trees, bends, overtaking.
50 km/h from the yellow town sign; 30 often signed.
Buses, bikes, pedestrians; dense parking rules.
Walking pace; children may play; park only in marked spots.
Bikes set the pace, side-by-side allowed; cars max 30 if permitted.
items.d: Räder geben Tempo vor, nebeneinander ok; Kfz max 30 falls frei.

items.e: Vehicles banned unless a plate frees them (delivery windows).
